basic_details.job_title: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of RBI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from university recognized by Medical Council of India, Post Graduate degree in General Medicine, Minimum two years experience practicing medicine
qualification.details: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine. Minimum two (02) years of experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic. Post graduate degree in General Medicine preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RBI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) position in the Reserve Bank of India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a university recognized by the Medical Council of India and have a minimum of two years of experience practicing medicine. A Post Graduate degree in General Medicine is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) position is Rs. 1000 per hour.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post includes an Interview, Medical Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this RBI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this RBI recruitment is Imphal, Manipur.

faq.question: Q9. Does the RBI offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details for this particular post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant pages on the RBI website.
